findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "read_shorttext" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Fetch a shortText by its slug (the id in a shorttext.com/{slug} URL). Returns the text body and metadata. Public and unlisted shortTexts are open; private ones …

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "create_shorttext" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
